---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or new algorithm module for this platform
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. "I'm frustrated when trying to run sequence operations on large datasets..."

**Describe the Solution You'd Like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Include any specific mathematical formula, time complexity targets, or UI panels.

**Describe Alternatives You've Considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Additional Context**
Add any other context, mockup drawings, or references to biological papers here.
